commodities.name: Crude Oil & Petroleum
downstream_impacts: Refinery throughput cuts in Asia and Europe

commodities.name: Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG)
commodities.notes: Qatar halted all LNG production at Ras Laffan after Iranian drone attack (March 2-3). ~93% of Hormuz LNG is Qatari.
downstream_impacts: Taiwan power generation at risk (Qatar = ~30% of Taiwan LNG)
European gas storage crisis (46 bcm vs 77 bcm normal; TTF +76%)
India exposed (60% of gas via Hormuz)
Pakistan critical (99% of LNG from Qatar+UAE)

commodities.name: Petrochemicals

sub_commodities.name: sulfur
sub_commodities.notes: Critical for sulfuric acid → semiconductor manufacturing

sub_commodities.name: urea
sub_commodities.notes: Spring planting season — immediate agricultural impact

downstream_impacts: Spring planting disrupted globally (Brazil, India, US)
Sulfuric acid supply chain → semiconductor risk

commodities.name: Semiconductors

pathways.name: Chemical stockpile
pathways.chain: Gulf sulfur → sulfuric acid → wafer cleaning/etching

pathways.name: Energy (TSMC)
pathways.chain: Qatar LNG → Taiwan power → TSMC fabs

downstream_impacts: TSMC fab operations at risk from power shortages (LNG pathway)
Electronic-grade sulfuric acid stockpile depleting (30-60 days)
TSMC accelerating Arizona fab as strategic hedge

days_to_impact.notes: Qatar LNG → Taiwan power → TSMC. 30% of Taiwan LNG from Qatar.
Storage at 46 bcm (vs 77 normal). TTF +76%. 10% of LNG imports via Hormuz.
Northern Hemisphere spring planting NOW. 49% of global urea exports via Hormuz.
Dubai has ~10 days fresh food supply. GCC imports 85% of food, 70%+ via Hormuz.
Middle East exports >1M bbl/day jet fuel (17% global). Prices +33%.
India: 50% crude + 60% gas via Hormuz. Pakistan: 99% LNG from Qatar+UAE.

summary: Supply chain disruption is CRITICAL. Oil: 87% disrupted (2.6M bbl/day vs 20M bbl/day baseline, bypass 2.6M bbl/day). LNG: 99% disrupted — Qatar production halted. Petrochemicals: 88% disrupted (fertilizer crisis during spring planting). Semiconductors: 53% indirect risk. 5 supply chains reach critical impact within 14 days.
